items.prompt: This pupil studies well.
The female pupil sits at the first desk.
The female teacher explains a new rule.
The school principal is a serious person.
What is your favorite subject?
I love mathematics most of all.
In biology we study animals.
Geography is an interesting subject.
In literature class we read poems.
items.answer: На уроке литературы мы читаем стихи.

items.prompt: Chemistry is very difficult for me.
Physics is my favorite subject.
In geometry we draw triangles.
Algebra is part of mathematics.
The Russian language lesson is very useful.
I study a foreign language at school.
items.answer: Я изучаю иностранный язык в школе.

items.prompt: In PE we run and jump.
items.answer: На физкультуре мы бегаем и прыгаем.

items.prompt: Drawing class helps to be attentive.
This schoolboy is always first.
The schoolgirl is writing in the notebook.
There are twenty pupils in our classroom.
I sit at the desk by the window.
items.answer: Я сижу за партой у окна.

items.prompt: During the break the children play in the yard.
items.answer: На перемене дети играют во дворе.

items.prompt: The school bell rang, the lesson began.
Tomorrow we have a test in chemistry.
items.answer: Завтра у нас контрольная по химии.

items.prompt: The teacher slowly reads the dictation.
I wrote a long essay.
Every rule must be memorized.
This math example is very simple.
The problem was difficult, but I solved it.
items.answer: Задача была трудной, но я её решил.

items.prompt: Your answer is correct.
I have a question for the teacher.
items.answer: У меня есть вопрос к учителю.

items.prompt: Today I got an A grade.
An F is a bad grade.
Mom looked at my diary.
There are books and notebooks in the schoolbag.
items.answer: В портфеле лежат книги и тетради.

items.prompt: The pencil case is on the desk.
There is a big globe on the table.
I look in the atlas in geography class.
items.answer: Я смотрю в атлас на уроке географии.

items.prompt: I have been studying Russian for three years.
items.answer: Я изучаю русский язык три года.

items.prompt: One must memorize new words every day.
items.answer: Надо запоминать новые слова каждый день.

items.prompt: I often forget the rules.
All pupils sometimes make mistakes.
The female teacher corrects our mistakes.
I solve math problems every evening.
items.answer: Я решаю задачи по математике каждый вечер.

items.prompt: The teacher checks the notebooks at home.
It is forbidden to prompt during the test.
The pupil raises his hand to answer.
I do not like to answer at the board.
items.answer: Я не люблю отвечать у доски.

items.prompt: The homework was very big.
Summer holidays are the best time.
